user_story: As a department stakeholder, I want to submit an exit clearance form, so that the employee's clearance can be recorded and approved
acceptance_criteria: Given a clearance is Pending submission; When I complete and submit it; Then its status changes to Pending approval

user_story: As an approver, I want to approve exit clearances pending with me, so that offboarding can be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given a clearance has status Pending with me; When I open its Task; Then I can approve the clearance

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter clearances by initiation period, department, and exit type, so that I can locate the relevant clearances
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Clearance List screen; When I set an initiation period and select a department and exit type; Then only matching clearances are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter clearances by status, so that I can track their progress
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Exit Clearance List screen; When I select a status such as Pending approval or Approved; Then only matching clearances are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search and reset the clearance list, so that I can refine or clear my query
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then matching records are displayed; And clicking Reset clears the filters
